title: Runloop Secret
description: A Secret represents a key-value pair that can be securely stored and used in Devboxes as environment variables.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Secret.

name.description: The globally unique name of the Secret. Used as the environment variable name in Devboxes.

create_time_ms.description: Creation time of the Secret (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).

update_time_ms.description: Last update time of the Secret (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).
